start.text: You are Zara Vex, a struggling private investigator with a minor talent for divination magic. Your office in the Lowtown district of Neo-Ankh is dimly lit by the glow of neon signs outside. A holographic notification blinks insistently, alerting you to an incoming call.
start.environment: A cluttered office in Lowtown, filled with a mix of magical artifacts and outdated tech. The air smells of ozone and stale coffee.
start.image_prompt: Cyberpunk detective office, neon lights, magical artifacts, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by Blade Runner

node1.text: You answer the call. A frantic woman appears on the holo-display. 'My name is Lyra Starling. My brother, Cassius, has gone missing. He works for MagiTech Industries. Please, you're my last hope.'

npc.name: Lyra Starling
npc.dialogue: I haven't heard from Cassius in days. It's not like him. He was working on something big, but he wouldn't tell me what. Can you help?

node1.image_prompt: Holographic display of a worried woman, cyberpunk style, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by Blade Runner 2049

node2.text: You agree to take the case. As you step out of your office, the bustling streets of Neo-Ankh greet you. Hover-cars zoom overhead while street vendors peddle a mix of tech gadgets and magical charms.
node2.environment: Crowded streets of Lowtown, a blend of high-tech and mystical elements.
node2.image_prompt: Cyberpunk city street, hover-cars, magical charms, street vendors, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by Blade Runner and Shadowrun

node3.text: You arrive at the towering headquarters of MagiTech Industries. The building seems to defy physics, its architecture a blend of gleaming metal and shimmering magical fields.
node3.environment: MagiTech Industries HQ, a massive structure in the Corporate District that radiates both technological and magical power.
node3.image_prompt: Futuristic corporate tower, magical energy fields, imposing entrance, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by Inception and Doctor Strange

node4.text: As you attempt to bluff your way past reception, alarms suddenly blare. Security drones descend, their magical sensors having detected your investigator's badge.
node4.image_prompt: Cyberpunk lobby battle, detective vs hovering security drones, magical energy flashes, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by The Matrix

node5.text: After dispatching the drones, you make your way to the upper floors. You overhear a conversation mentioning 'Project Nexus' and realize it may be connected to Cassius's disappearance.
node5.environment: Dimly lit corporate hallways with holographic displays and scattered employees.
node5.image_prompt: Futuristic office corridor, detective eavesdropping, holographic screens, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by Minority Report

node6.text: You locate the data center, hoping to access files on Cassius and Project Nexus. As you begin the hack, the AI security system activates, manifesting as a digital entity intent on stopping you.
node6.image_prompt: Cyberpunk data center, detective interfacing with holographic controls, malevolent AI face on screens, chaotic energy pulses, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by Tron and The Matrix

node7.text: Victorious but shaken, you escape with crucial data about Project Nexus and a possible location for Cassius in Neo-Ankh's undercity. You realize this case is far bigger and more dangerous than you initially thought.
node7.environment: Rain-soaked streets outside MagiTech Industries, the cityscape of Neo-Ankh stretching into the smoggy distance.
node7.image_prompt: Detective exiting corporate tower at night, city lights reflecting off rain-soaked streets, determined expression, holding glowing data device, high detail, 8k resolution, inspired by Blade Runner 2049
